title: oreobroma kelloggii
intro: Oreobroma kelloggii, also known as Kellogg's Oreobroma, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include treating conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Oreobroma kelloggii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
